objects.query: SELECT ArePartialPeriodsAllowed, Name, ProrationPolicyType, RemainderStrategy FROM ProrationPolicy WHERE Id IN (SELECT ProrationPolicyId FROM ProductSellingModelOption WHERE Product2.StockKeepingUnit IN ('NS-STARTER', 'NS-PRO', 'NS-ENTERPRISE')) ORDER BY Name ASC

SELECT DoesAutoRenewAssetByDefault, Name, PricingTerm, PricingTermUnit, SellingModelType, Status FROM ProductSellingModel WHERE Id IN (SELECT ProductSellingModelId FROM ProductSellingModelOption WHERE Product2.StockKeepingUnit IN ('NS-STARTER', 'NS-PRO', 'NS-ENTERPRISE')) ORDER BY Name ASC, SellingModelType ASC

SELECT CanRamp, ConfigureDuringSale, Description, DisplayUrl, Family, IsActive, IsAssetizable, IsSoldOnlyWithOtherProds, Name, ProductCode, SpecificationType, StockKeepingUnit, Type FROM Product2 WHERE StockKeepingUnit IN ('NS-STARTER', 'NS-PRO', 'NS-ENTERPRISE') ORDER BY StockKeepingUnit ASC

SELECT IsDefault, Product2Id, ProductSellingModelId, ProrationPolicyId, Product2.StockKeepingUnit, ProductSellingModel.Name, ProductSellingModel.SellingModelType FROM ProductSellingModelOption WHERE Product2.StockKeepingUnit IN ('NS-STARTER', 'NS-PRO', 'NS-ENTERPRISE') ORDER BY Product2.StockKeepingUnit ASC, ProductSellingModel.Name ASC, ProductSellingModel.SellingModelType ASC

SELECT DurationType, ProductId, ProductSellingModelId, SegmentType, TrialDuration, Product.StockKeepingUnit, ProductSellingModel.Name FROM ProductRampSegment WHERE Product.StockKeepingUnit IN ('NS-STARTER', 'NS-PRO', 'NS-ENTERPRISE') ORDER BY Product.StockKeepingUnit ASC, ProductSellingModel.Name ASC, SegmentType ASC
